programs.title: Come Dine with Me
programs.desc: Planning enforcement officer Becky hosts an evening of modern home-cooking, including crispy croutons and a lamb shank stew. Two of her guests take a shine to one another.

programs.title: Come Dine with Me
programs.desc: Shoba serves an Indian menu, but her guests aren't impressed with her frozen fish curry. Can some Bollywood-style belly dancing save the day.

programs.title: Come Dine with Me
programs.desc: Drum tutor Rob hopes that his Thai-tastic menu will wow his guests - especially the object of his affections, Petrina.

programs.title: Come Dine with Me
programs.desc: Singing teacher Petrina hopes that her experience entertaining on cruise ships will give her evening the edge. And her salted caramel chocolate dessert serves up a surprise.

programs.title: Come Dine with Me
programs.desc: On the final night, Giovanni flies the flag for Sicily with some family recipes. But he has a tagliatelle tragedy.

programs.title: Help! I Bought It at Auction with Sarah Beeny
programs.desc: Christy and Matt pour £1m into a seven-bed house in serious need of TLC. Heather and Dave take on converted stables that they bought when they were on holiday.
